value.Xsl:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
    <xsl:stylesheet xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" version="1.0" xmlns:d2p1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">
      
      <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes"/>

      <xsl:template match="/">
        <ImportacaoPublicacaoItems>
          <xsl:for-each select="NewDataSet/Publicacao">
            <ImportacaoPublicacaoItem>
              
              <CodigoRelacional>
                <xsl:value-of select="CodigoRelacional" />
              </CodigoRelacional>

              <DataPublicacao>
                <d2p1:DateTime>
                  <xsl:choose>
                    <xsl:when test="string-length(substring-before(DataPublicacao, '-')) = 4 and contains(DataPublicacao,'-')">
                      <xsl:value-of select="DataPublicacao"/>T12:00:00.00Z
                    </xsl:when>
                    <xsl:otherwise>
                      <xsl:value-of select="substring(DataPublicacao, 7, 4)"/>-<xsl:value-of select="substring(DataPublicacao, 4, 2)"/>-<xsl:value-of select="substring(DataPublicacao, 1, 2)"/>T12:00:00.00Z
                    </xsl:otherwise>
                  </xsl:choose>
                </d2p1:DateTime>
                <d2p1:OffsetMinutes>0</d2p1:OffsetMinutes>
              </DataPublicacao>
              
              <Nome>
                <xsl:value-of select="Nome" />
              </Nome>
              
              <Processo>
                <xsl:value-of select="Processo" />
              </Processo>
              
              <Diario>
                <xsl:value-of select="Diario" />
              </Diario>
              
              <Texto>
                <xsl:value-of select="Texto" />
              </Texto>
              
              <Obs>
                <xsl:value-of select="Obs" />
              </Obs>

              <Codigo>
                <xsl:value-of select="Codigo" />
              </Codigo>
              <Pagina>
                <xsl:value-of select="Pagina" />
              </Pagina>

            </ImportacaoPublicacaoItem>
          </xsl:for-each>
        </ImportacaoPublicacaoItems>
      </xsl:template>
    </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

              <DataPublicacao>
                <d2p1:DateTime>
                  <xsl:choose>
                    <xsl:when test="string-length(substring-before(DataPublicacao, '-')) = 4 and contains(DataPublicacao,'-')">
                      <xsl:value-of select="DataPublicacao"/>T12:00:00.00Z
                    </xsl:when>
                    <xsl:otherwise>
                      <xsl:value-of select="substring(DataPublicacao, 7, 4)"/>-<xsl:value-of select="substring(DataPublicacao, 4, 2)"/>-<xsl:value-of select="substring(DataPublicacao, 1, 2)"/>T12:00:00.00Z

                  </xsl:choose>
                </d2p1:DateTime>
                <d2p1:OffsetMinutes>0</d2p1:OffsetMinutes>

              <Codigo>
